title: MFG Technology - Mechanical Engineer
description:
MFG Technology-Mechanical Engineer role requires a strong background in mechanical engineering, especially with alloys and composites used in oil and gas products, capable of withstanding high temperatures, high pressures, and corrosive environments. This role emphasizes designing manufacturing processes, testing, and improving mechanical components and assemblies to meet the highest quality and performance standards. The mechanical engineer should also have broad knowledge of sourcing, machining, 3D printing, and composite manufacturing to provide solutions for technical challenges.


Role and Responsibilities:

Manufacturing and Testing:

  • Oversee the manufacturing process of mechanical components, ensuring adherence to quality standards and specifications.
  • Develop and implement inspection and testing procedures for mechanical structures and components.
  • Conduct rigorous testing of mechanical devices to ensure reliability and performance under operating conditions.

Design and Development:

  • Assist in designing and developing new mechanical structures and components.
  • Use CAD software to produce detailed designs and technical drawings.
  • Work with the design team to optimize mechanical designs for manufacturability and performance.

Quality Assurance:

  • Ensure all mechanical components meet company quality standards and industry regulations.
  • Conduct quality audits and inspections.· Ensure all mechanical components meet company quality standards and industry regulations.
  • Implement continuous improvement initiatives to enhance product quality and manufacturing efficiency.

Documentation and Reporting:

  • Maintain detailed documentation of testing procedures, troubleshooting processes, and maintenance activities.
  • Prepare and present technical reports on the performance and reliability of mechanical components.
  • Ensure all documentation complies with QMS requirements.

Collaboration and Communication:

  • Work closely with cross-functional teams, including design, production, and quality, to ensure seamless integration of manufacturing processes.
  • Provide technical support and training to production staff on the assembly, testing, and maintenance of the products.
  • Liaise with suppliers and external partners to ensure the quality and availability of mechanical components.

Skills and Experiences:

  • Strong knowledge of mechanical engineering principles, particularly in materials.
  • Extensive experience in the manufacturing and testing of mechanical components and systems.
  • Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Proficiency in CAD software (SolidWorks and PDM) and other engineering tools.

General:

  • Committed to a high standard of safety and willing to comply with all safety laws and all the company’s safety policies and rules. Must be willing to report safety violations and potential safety violations to appropriate supervisory or management personnel.
  • Perform other duties as assigned.

Qualifications and Education Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical Engineering or a related field.
  • Minimum of 5 years of experience in mechanical engineering.
  • Knowledge of industry standards and regulations relevant to mechanical components in the oil and gas sector.

Key Competencies:

  • Safety awareness
  • Technical Expertise
  • Curiosity about technology
  • Problem Solving
  • Quality Assurance and Control
  • Team Collaboration
  • Communication
  • Attention to Detail
  • Accountability

postedCompany.description:
At GOWell, we are continually evolving to meet the growing needs of our customers in the oil and gas, geothermal, and carbon capture industries. Since our founding in 2005, we have expanded globally to better support our customer base. Today, our operations include research and development centers in Houston (USA) and Xian (China), as well as production facilities in Houston, TX (USA), Dubai (UAE), and Xian (China). To further enhance our services, we also maintain technical support centers worldwide, providing comprehensive training on our technologies.

Our journey has been remarkable, and we remain committed to continuous growth while nurturing a warm, collaborative, and family-like environment. At GOWell, every individual makes a difference.
postedCompany.name: GOWELL TECHNOLOGY SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
